info.name: EduConnect - All User Endpoints (Fixed)
info.description:
All 111 endpoints with hardcoded http://localhost:8081. No {{baseUrl}} variable needed.

How to use:
1. Run any Login request first
2. Token auto-saves to {{token}}
3. All other requests use it automatically

exec: console.log('✅ TEACHER token saved, userId:', res.data.userId);
